title: The Apprentices Act, 1961
full_text: The Apprentices Act, 1961 शिक्षु अधिनियम, 1961 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196152 Act Number: 52 Enactment Date: 1961-12-12 Act Year: 1961 Short Title: The Apprentices Act, 1961 Hindi Title: शिक्षु अधिनियम, 1961 Long Title: An Act to provide for the regulation and control of training of apprentices and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship Enforcement Date: 01-03-1962 Notification: 1st March, 1962, vide notification No. G.S.R. 246, dated 12th February, 1962, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Apprentices Act, 1961 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPER II APPRENTICES AND THEIR TRAINING CHAPTER III AUTHORITIES Section 1. Short title, extent, commencement and application. Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Qualifications for being engaged as an apprentice. Show Related Subordinates Section 3A. Reservation of training places for the Scheduled Castes and the Scheduled Tribes in designated trades. Show Related Subordinates Section 3B. Reservation of training places for Other Backward Classes in designated trades. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Contract of apprenticeship. Section 5. Novation of contract of apprenticeship. Show Related Subordinates Section 5A. Regulation of optional trade. Section 5B. Engagement of apprentices from other States. Section 6. Period of apprenticeship training. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Termination of apprenticeship contract. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Number of apprentices for a designated trade. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Practical and basic training of apprentices. Section 10. Related instruction of apprentices. Section 11. Obligations of employers. Section 12. Obligations of apprentices. Section 13. Payment to apprentices. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Health, safety and welfare of apprentices. Section 15. Hours of work, overtime, leave and holidays. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Employer‟s liability for compensation for injury. Section 17. Conduct and discipline. Section 18. Apprentices are trainees and not workers. Section 19. Records and returns. Show Related Subordinates Section 20. Settlement of disputes. Section 21. Holding of test and grant of certificate and conclusion of training. Section 22. Offer and acceptance of employment. Section 23. Authorities. Section 24. Constitution of Councils. Section 25. Vacancies not to invalidate acts and proceedings. Section 26. Apprenticeship Advisers. Section 27. Deputy and Assistant Apprenticeship Advisers. Section 28. Apprenticeship Advisers to be public servants. Section 29. Powers of entry, inspection, etc. Section 30. Offences and penalties. Section 31. Penalty where no specific penalty is provided. Section 32. Offences by companies. Section 33. Cognizance of offences. Section 34. Delegation of powers. Section 35. Construction of references. Section 36. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 37. Power to make rules. Section 38. Repeal. Schedule 1.
